integrity.description: The agent used the DHIS2 web GUI to create the visualizations and dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser navigating the DHIS2 interface (Data Visualizer, Maps, and Dashboard apps) rather than a terminal executing API curl commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The visualizations are genuinely rendered by the DHIS2 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The charts, tables, and maps display actual rendered graphical elements and data grids typical of DHIS2, not manually edited HTML or text files.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write the expected output names into a text document.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) being used to mock the task completion; all work is done within the browser at localhost:8080.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target dashboard must be named exactly 'Bo District Malaria Burden 2023'. It must contain at least 3 visualization items targeting Bo district for the year 2023. The required items are: 1) A bar/column chart named 'Bo Malaria Monthly Cases 2023' (monthly periods), 2) A pivot table named 'Bo Malaria Positivity Quarterly 2023' (quarterly periods), and 3) A thematic map named 'Bo Malaria Facility Map 2023' (facility-level distribution).
